description_long: This armchair features a rounded, barrel-like backrest and armrests that seamlessly curve into each other, creating an enveloping and comfortable seating area. The upholstery is adorned with a bold floral print, with large, dark-outlined flowers set against a lighter background, giving it a decorative and inviting appearance. The seat is deep and slightly recessed, providing ample space for sitting, while the back and sides rise to a medium height for support. The legs are slender, slightly curved, and appear to be made of dark wood or a similar material, adding a touch of elegance. The overall structure suggests a lightweight yet sturdy build, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings. The armchair's design is both functional and visually striking, making it a standout piece in any urban environment.
description: A rounded armchair with a floral print upholstery, curved back and armrests, and slender, dark legs. The design is decorative and supportive, ideal for comfortable seating in urban spaces.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the curved backrest and floral upholstery pattern, with the armrest and leg contours visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the deep seat, enveloping armrests, and the full floral pattern on the interior surfaces.
description_view_2: Opposite rear three-quarter view, emphasizing the continuous curve of the backrest and the floral print, with partial leg visibility.
description_view_3: Direct rear view displaying the full width of the backrest and the consistent floral pattern, with all four legs partially visible.
attribute_armrest_design: curved and upholstered, continuous with backrest
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, rounded, fully upholstered with floral print
attribute_upholstery_pattern: large floral print with dark outlines on a light background
